truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 correctly identified 5 of the 20 true vulnerabilities with exact title quotes, while missing the remaining 15. It overclaimed severity for three findings (Medium/High instead of Critical/High) and misattributed CWE codes and locations for two findings (safe_string_copy vs Input Processing, CWE-193 vs 120/121, and CWE-120 vs 122). No false positives were present, as all five cited findings map directly to true vulnerabilities.

Items.Notes: Matches format-string injection via runtime log format and printf call. Severity was reported as Medium instead of Critical.
Not mentioned in the five findings.
Not mentioned in the five findings.
Matches command injection via system() call. Severity reported as High instead of Critical. Location attributed to execute_admin_command rather than Config Validation.

Identifies a buffer overflow in string copying, but attributes it to safe_string_copy off-by-one (CWE-193) rather than the stack buffer overflow in input processing (CWE-120/121). Severity reported as Low instead of High.
